column2: Test Case: System Enforces Airspace Restrictions
column3: ['A user plans an operation in restricted airspace. ', 'The user obtains necessary permissions for the operation. ', 'The user adheres to airspace restrictions during the operation. ', 'The system correctly identifies the restricted airspace for the operation. ', 'The system enforces airspace restrictions during the operation. ']
column4: ['The user has specified that they will be operating within restricted airspace. ', 'The user possesses all required permits and approvals to perform the planned operation. ', 'The user follows all applicable rules, regulations, and guidelines related to restricted airspace while performing their operation. ', 'The system recognizes that the planned operation is taking place within restricted airspace. ', 'The system prevents any actions or activities that violate the specified airspace restrictions while the user performs their operation. ']
